viewContainer.title: Project Atlas
view.projects.name: Projects
view.recent.name: Recent
view.favorites.name: Favorites
view.tasks.name: Tasks
command.git-atlas.openMergeEditorFromSCM: Open in Git Atlas Merge Editor
config.title: Project Atlas
config.recentProjectsLimit: Maximum number of recent projects to display.
config.openProjectMode: How to open projects: 'ask' (prompt each time), 'currentWindow', or 'newWindow'.
config.openMode: Click behavior for opening a project (single click, double click, or follow IDE).
config.confirmDelete: Whether to confirm before deleting a project or group. 'ask' shows a confirmation dialog, 'never' deletes immediately.
config.showRevealActiveFile: Show 'Reveal Active File' button in the built-in file explorer view title.
config.taskAtlas.showRecentRuns: Show the 'Recent Runs' group at the top of the task list.
config.taskAtlas.maxRecentRuns: Maximum number of recently run tasks to display.
config.taskAtlas.showPinned: Show the 'Pinned' group at the top of the task list.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle: Commit list display style for Git Atlas.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle.vscode: VSCode style: two groups (Staged Changes / Changes) with hover actions.
config.gitAtlas.commitListStyle.jetbrain: JetBrains style: checkbox-based selection with separate groups.
